### Under 22? Scroll down to view our dedicated plan for younger drivers

### **Basic & Standard Membership Includes:**

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/clock.svg)

#### Use app to book & unlock 24/7

Use our highly-rated mobile app to book, unlock and return vehicles to their designated parking bay 24/7 all year round.

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/car-UK.svg)

#### Rent cars & vans UK-wide

Access vehicles across the UK, based at dedicated on-street parking bays, train stations, car parks or Enterprise Rent-A-Car Branches.

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/fuel-gauge.svg)

#### Fuel included in the mileage fee

A small per-mile charge is calculated based on how far you drive. This is added to your rental charge, billed at the end of your trip.

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/person.svg)

#### Join from 22 years old

From 22 years old you can unlock the benefits that come with the Basic or Standard Plans. No need to have held a license for a minimum period. Click here to view Under 22 Plan.

[Under 22 Plans](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/programs/regions/south-east-england/guildford.html/?mcid=localsearch:25028919#U22)

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/pound.svg)

#### Breakdown & liability protection included

Roadside assistance & a standard excess of £1,250 for cars & £1,500 for vans, per incident is included [click to learn more](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/blog/Damage_Waiver.html).

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/cancel.svg)

#### Free cancellation 5 hours before start

If you've booked in advance you can cancel completely FREE of charge up to 5 hours before the start of your reservation.

Guildford Automated Daily & Hourly Car & Van Hire \| Enterprise Car Club![](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

## Membership for drivers aged 19-21

Join and you can access vehicles across the UK, picking it up from a street, train station, car park.

## U22 Monthly

# £10

per month

£10 joining fee

For those aged between 19-21 years old with 1 years driving history **For young users**

Select Plan

Rates for an economy vehicle starting at £11.59 per hour.\*

[View Example Rental Rates​](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/programs/regions/south-east-england/guildford/rate-plans.html?ratePlanName=under-22)

### Under 22 Membership Includes:

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/clock.svg)

#### Use app to book & unlock

Use our highly-rated mobile app to book, unlock and return vehicles to their designated parking bay. (Renting restricted to 5am - 10pm.)

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/car-UK.svg)

#### Rent cars UK-wide

Access any of our small or medium class cars across the UK.

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/fuel-gauge.svg)

#### Fuel included in the mileage fee

A 65p per-mile charge is calculated based on how far you drive. This is added to your rental charge, billed at the end of your trip.

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/person.svg)

#### Join from 19 years old

Join from 19 years old, once you've held your full license for at least a year. Move to our Standard or Basic plans as soon as you turn 22.

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/pound.svg)

#### Breakdown & liability protection included

Roadside assistance & a standard excess of £1,000 per incident is included.

![Alt Text](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/content/dam/ccw/icons/member-benefits-icons/cancel.svg)

#### Free cancellation 5 hours before start

If you've booked in advance you can cancel completely FREE of charge up to 5 hours before the start of your reservation.

## Member Offers

- [Refer a Friend](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/contact-us/refer-a-friend.html)  – Earn and gift £20 FREE driving credit for you and a friend

- [Join for Half Price](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/programs/promotion/switch-generic.html) – If you're already a member of another car club

- [Add an Additional Driver](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/programs/promotion/add-additional-driver.html) – For £30, you can add an additional driver to your account

- [Service Discounts](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/programs/promotion/enterprise-services-discount.html) – Discounted joining for members of the Armed Forces, NHS and Emergency Services

- [Member Benefits](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/programs/promotion/member-benefits.html) – Discounts you can unlock once you become a member

## Business rate plans are also available

We provide customised plans that allow you and your company to decrease travel expenses, increase productivity and meet sustainability goals, all while taking advantage of our business plans with reduced rates and fees.

**[Find Out More](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/programs/business.html)**

An inquiry may appear on your credit report but it will not impact your credit score.<br>#### Key considerations<br>- For each reservation you’ll be charged rental (based on a per hour or per day calculation) and mileage (based on how far you drove). An estimate for your rental will be displayed before you confirm your reservation. For more info on pricing [click here](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/programs/pricing-and-plans.html).<br>- If you are aged 22 or over you can reduce your standard excess from £1,250 for cars and £1,500 for vans to £250 per incident for £25/month or £250 per year.<br>- You are liable for any parking, tolls and fines from any parking tickets or traffic offences. These also may attract an administration fee. |  | - Pay a maximum of £30 if you cancel your reservation within 5hrs of your reservation.<br>- Members are restricted to a 7 day maximum rental or £250 spend limit (excl. mileage) whichever is lesser. Further restrictions apply for those on the ‘Under 22’ plan.<br>- Time (duration) of rental - calculated in 15 minute increments from the start to end of your reservation.<br>- We ask all our members to adhere to our [Car Club Code](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/about/car-club-code.html).<br>Find out more about [Other Charges](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/about/membership-policies-other-charges.html) or see our full [Terms & Conditions](https://www.enterprisecarclub.co.uk/gb/en/terms/terms-and-conditions.html).<br>_\*Please note not all vehicle classes are available in all locations. Rates shown are based on the average economy rate across the region and therefore will vary by individual location. The day rate is an average based on the weekday rate. The rate for a specific vehicle will be quoted before you confirm your reservation during the booking process. Rates table last updated 01/01/2026._ |
